name: Ruby C Fulbright Aquatic Center
description: Ruby C Fulbright Aquatic Center is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Clarkesville, GA. There are 12 courts. 6 are indoors and 6 are outdoors. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. Players have access to restrooms and lights. The courts are free.
open_play_schedule: Indoor Courts are available from 8:00 am-2:00 PM M-F unless reserved for other sports. Outdoor courts are open 24/7 with access to lights and restrooms.

name: The Orchard
description: The Orchard is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Clarkesville, GA. There are 6 outdoor courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. A membership is required to play. The facility includes amenities like lights.
